title: Role-Based Access Control: How to Build an RBAC App with AI
summary: This video demonstrates building a complete event management system with role-based access control, permissions, and workflow automations using Softr's AI Co-Builder. The presenter contrasts Softr with alternatives like Lovable and Replit, emphasizing how structured AI-assisted development can reduce costs from redundant prompting.
